final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic still of a post-apocalyptic wasteland scene with a modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert.

Style/medium: photorealistic digital matte painting, post-apocalyptic wasteland aesthetic in the spirit of Mad Max: Fury Road concept art
Composition: wide establishing shot, low horizon line, armored vehicle positioned in lower third, collapsed city ruins in distant background, atmospheric perspective
Subject: heavily modified armored vehicle with scrap metal plating, rusted chassis, reinforced bumpers, weathered paint, survival gear strapped to exterior
Scene/backdrop: vast desert wasteland, sand dunes, collapsed skyscrapers and crumbling infrastructure on horizon, dust storms swirling in distance
Lighting/mood: diffused golden-hour haze through thick dust particles, low visibility, oppressive and tense survival atmosphere
Color palette: dominant ochre yellow and burnt orange sand, muted browns and rust reds on vehicle, sickly yellow-brown sky gradient
Materials/textures: coarse sand with wind ripples, corroded metal with peeling paint, cracked concrete ruins, fine airborne dust particles
Avoid: clean surfaces, bright saturated colors, blue sky, pristine vehicles, over-sharpening, 8K stuffer aesthetic
